arms.C: 150-word budget + 'Preserve all identifiers, codes, numbers, and proper nouns verbatim.'

seeds.note: content seed = base_seed + chain_idx; same chain_idx shares facts/filler across arms

preregistered_rules.scoring: case-insensitive substring match of each 8-char code in each round's summary; whitespace normalized. Corruption (integrity loss) scored separately: any token matching [A-Z0-9]{6,10} in the summary with Levenshtein distance 1-2 from a planted code that is not itself present verbatim.
preregistered_rules.calibration_gate: pilot (Arm A) round-1 retention must lie in [0.15, 0.95]; outside that range, adjust fact count or filler length once and re-pilot before spending the main budget
preregistered_rules.geometric_fit: fit log S(r) = r * log s by least squares through the origin on arm-level chain-mean survival, rounds 1-5; half-life = ln(2)/(-ln(s))
preregistered_rules.shape_decision_rule: compute conditional per-round survival c_r = S(r)/S(r-1) on chain means; delta = c_1 - mean(c_2..c_5); decay is called FRONT-LOADED if the 95 percent bootstrap CI of delta (resampling chains, 10000 reps) excludes 0 and delta < 0; otherwise consistent with geometric
preregistered_rules.arm_comparison: H2/H3 assessed by the 95 percent bootstrap CI (resampling chains, 10000 reps) of the difference in round-5 survival and in fitted s between arms; a difference is claimed only if the CI excludes 0
preregistered_rules.cost_latency: reported only from total_cost_usd and duration_api_ms fields of retained raw JSON, never estimated
preregistered_rules.probes: for each Arm A chain, 1 call with 3 questions (mix of substring-retained and substring-lost codes) answered from the round-5 summary only; retained-code agreement = exact match; lost codes classified UNKNOWN (abstain) vs any other code-like answer (confabulation)
